summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BETRADARMUS new authentication, payment and live data features. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% pass rate) and frontend integration fully functional with successful Stripe payment flow.

design_issues.issue: Authenticated state not clearly visible (no logout button or user indicator)

passed_tests: User registration via /api/auth/register (email, password validation, JWT token)
Protected route /api/auth/me returns user data with subscription level
Live opportunities endpoint /api/analysis/opportunities (free user limit of 5 enforced)
Live opportunities with authentication (premium features structure)
Payment checkout /api/payments/checkout creates Stripe session for Pro plan
Subscription plans endpoint returns correct pricing (Pro €19, Elite €39)
Navbar shows ANMELDEN/REGISTRIEREN buttons for unauthenticated users
Auth modal opens and form fields work (name, email, password inputs)
Pricing cards display 'ANMELDEN & UPGRADEN' for non-authenticated users
Live Dashboard shows real football data (Arsenal vs Chelsea, Leipzig vs Frankfurt)
Confidence indicators, risk scores (HIGH/MED/LOW), and EV values display correctly
SofaScore API integration working with live match data
Successful user authentication flow (login modal -> form fill -> successful login)
Payment checkout redirects to Stripe with correct amount (€19.00 for Pro)
Early access form submission works with backend integration

success_percentage.backend: 100% (14/14 tests passed including new auth & payment features)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (15/16 major features working, 1 minor UI enhancement needed)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (auth flow, payment flow, live data all working)
